title: Suspected Credential Stuffing from TOR Exit Node

raw_log: Sign-in logs: 47 failed attempts + 1 success within 90 seconds from same IP

title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Detected

title: Anomalous Azure Key Vault Access

title: Fileless Malware: PowerShell Script in Memory

title: Impossible Travel Detected

raw_log: SignInLogs: Two successful auths from SIN and LON within 5 minutes
